Dear Kim Petras\Amigo Records, LLC,
Please find enclosed your statement pack covering receipts for the period 01 July 2020 to 31 July 2020.
This statement pack provides a breakdown of all digital distribution revenues received by AWAL on your behalf during July 2020. A full breakdown of all
revenues is contained in the CSV data file that follows this statement.
If you have any questions regarding your account, please contact us via the Support section on the portal.
Yours sincerely,
Tara Calvert
Encl.
